parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ workflow: { id: $json.workflow.id, name: $json.workflow.name }, execution: { id: $json.execution.id, startedAt: $json.execution.url ? $json.execution.startedAt : $now.toISO(), stoppedAt: $now.toISO(), url: $json.execution.url }, error: { name: $json.execution.error?.name || 'N8N_ERROR', message: $json.execution.error?.message || 'Unknown error', node: $json.execution.error?.node || null, stack: $json.execution.error?.stack || null }, n8n_base_url: 'https://n8n.aimanagingservices.com', severity: ($json.execution.error?.name || '').toLowerCase().includes('credential') ? 'critical' : 'error' }) }}

parameters.text:
=:rotating_light: *{{ $('Error Trigger').item.json.workflow.name }}* failed
Node: `{{ $('Error Trigger').item.json.execution.error?.node || 'unknown' }}`
Error: {{ $('Error Trigger').item.json.execution.error?.message }}
<{{ $('Error Trigger').item.json.execution.url }}|Open in n8n>
